<function=python>

nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'R']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}] cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

# Count green (N) objects
n_count = sum(1 for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"\nGreen (N) objects: {n_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
